description: Compile each complete synthetic lifetime into a birth-to-terminal playable journey.

effects.playable_result: Spawns the player at the exact verified initial state.
Creates one state-linked encounter for every tick without omissions.
Changes local lore, objectives, and companion links as recorded updates occur.
Closes the journey only after final state and provenance hashes verify.

world_effects.failure: A continuity mismatch closes the projection without source mutation.
world_effects.interaction: Decide, idle, remember, pursue goals, form bonds, and verify transitions.
world_effects.spawn: A Complete Lifetime Gate appears in an accelerated simulation world.
